name: Eggplant with Tofu
recipeIngredient: 5 red chili peppers, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Yellow bean sauce from Thailand is saltier than sauce from Hong Kong or China. Season to taste.
1. Slice unpeeled eggplant crosswise into slices 1/8-inch thick.
2. Cut tofu into 1/2-inch cubes.
3. Heat oil in a skillet; add garlic and stir-fry until light brown (do not burn).
4. Add eggplant and tofu, and cook for 5 to 7 minutes.
5. Add the remaining ingredients; mix gently.
6. Serve immediately, as eggplant and basil will turn dark if the dish sits after cooking.
Makes 3 to 4 servings.
